name: reverse_in_place

code:
def reverse_in_place(mut v: List[Int]):
    var lo = 0
    var hi = len(v) - 1
    while lo < hi:
        var t = v[lo]
        v[lo] = v[hi]
        v[hi] = t
        lo += 1
        hi -= 1

name: Thermostat
day_kind
code:
comptime MON = 0
comptime TUE = 1
comptime WED = 2
comptime THU = 3
comptime FRI = 4
comptime SAT = 5
comptime SUN = 6

def is_weekend(day: Int) -> Int:
    if day == SAT or day == SUN:
        return 1
    return 0

name: turn_right
code:
comptime D_NORTH = 0
comptime D_EAST = 1
comptime D_SOUTH = 2
comptime D_WEST = 3

def turn_right(dir: Int) -> Int:
    return (dir + 1) % 4

def turn_left(dir: Int) -> Int:
    return (dir + 3) % 4

        return 1
    return 0

name: identity_build
Matrix2
detail: /tmp/claude-1000/tmp0gjyd3h_/b.mojo:3:12: error: use of unknown declaration 'SelfType'
code:
@fieldwise_init
struct Mat2(Copyable, Movable):
    var a: SelfType
    var b: SelfType
    var c: SelfType
    var d: SelfType

    def add(mut self, o: SelfType):
        self.a += o.a
        self.b += o.b
        self.c += o.c
        self.d += o.d

    def mul(mut self, o: SelfType):
        var a = self.a * o.a + self.b * o.c
        var b = self.a * o.b + self.b * o.d
        var c = self.c * o.a + self.d * o.c
        var d = self.c * o.b + self.d * o.d
        self.a = a
        self.b = b
        self.c = c
        self.d = d

    def det(self) -> SelfType:
        return self.a * self.d - self.b * self.c

name: is_power_of_two
swap_nibbles
code:
def swap_nibbles(b: UInt32) -> UInt32:
    var lo = b & 0x0F
    var hi = (b >> 4) & 0x0F
    return (lo << 4) | hi
